#### Abstract

en fr The medieval registers of the Notre-Dame de Paris cathedral chapter (ca. late 13th - 16th centuries), over 14,000 pages of which have been digitized and automatically transcribed (HTR), are now available on the https://endp.chartes.psl.eu/ application.
